creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
The port net-im/psi is outdated. Ports version is 0.10, actual version is 0.11.
Since psi versions are released in very slow manner, 0.10 and 0.11 differ enormously. 0.11 was released 15 Oct 2007.
Furthermore, 0.12-RC2 is released 2 months ago. I hope the ports version will be updated at least to 0.11.

How-To-Repeat: lynx "http://psi-im.org" && grep -i version /usr/ports/net-im/psi/Makefile on fresh ports.
